zh: “我们的特别新闻快讯到此结束,”

text: said the voice of the television announcer, 'we're going over to the macaroni fields of Calabria.
zh: 电视播音员的声音说道,“现在我们把镜头切到卡拉布里亚的通心粉田。

text: Macaroni has been grown in this area for over six hundred years.
zh: 这个地区种植通心粉已经有六百多年的历史了。

text: Two of the leading growers Giuseppe Moldova and Riccardo Brabante,
zh: 两位主要的种植者朱塞佩·莫尔多瓦和里卡多·布拉班特

text: tell me that they have been expecting a splendid crop this year and harvesting has begun earlier than usual.
zh: 告诉我,他们预计今年会有一个丰收年,收获期也比往常提前了。

text: Here you can see two workers who, between them,
zh: 在这里你可以看到两名工人,他们两人

text: have just finished cutting three cartloads of golden brown macaroni stalks.
zh: 刚刚完成了三车金棕色通心粉茎的收割。

text: The whole village has been working day and night gathering and threshing this year's crop before the September rains.
zh: 整个村子的人都在日夜劳作,赶在九月雨季之前采collect和脱粒今年的收成。

text: On the right, you can see Mrs. Brabante herself.
zh: 在右边,你可以看到布拉班特夫人本人。

text: She has been helping her husband for thirty years now.
zh: 她已经帮丈夫干了三十年了。

text: Mrs. Brabante is talking to the manager of the local factory where the crop is processed.
zh: 布拉班特夫人正在和当地工厂的经理交谈,收成就是在那里加工的。

text: This last scene shows you what will happen at the end of the harvest:
zh: 最后这一幕向你展示的是收获季结束时会发生的事情:
著名的卡拉布里亚吃通心粉大赛!

text: Signor Fratelli, the present champion, has won it every year since 1991.
zh: 现任冠军弗拉泰利先生自1991年以来每年都获胜。

text: And that ends our special bulletin for today, Thursday, April 1st.
zh: 我们今天的特别快讯到此结束,今天是四月一日,星期四。

text: We're now going back to the studio.'
zh: 现在我们把镜头切回演播室。”
